title: Aquifer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
An '''aquifer''' was an underground layer of rock from which ground [[Water/Legends|water]] could be extracted using a [[water well]], though this water could also flow naturally from [[freshwater spring]]s. Water found in aquifers was very cold. It was usually processed by an [[aquifer purifier]] before being distributed for consumption. [[Tap tree]]s, whose tubular roots descended hundreds of feet underground, were sometimes used to siphon water from an aquifer, such as the thousand-year-old one on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] maintained by [[Morgan Katarn]]. Also, on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], water was gathered and stored in giant artificial aquifers.
